APIErrorResponse.description:
APIErrorResponse is the top-level envelope wrapping a ResponseError.
All API error responses use this shape: { "error": { ... } }.

error.description: The error object containing details about what went wrong.

APIKey.description: APIKey represents an API key for authenticating API requests.

id.description: The unique identifier for the API key.

name.description: The human-readable name for the API key.

redacted_value.description: The redacted value of the API key for display purposes.

role.description: The role associated with this API key.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

last_used_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was last used.

expires_at.description: The timestamp when the API key expires.

revoked_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was revoked.

Account.description: Account represents a full account with optional branding and portal sub-resources.

id.description: The unique identifier for the account.

name.description: The display name of the account.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the account was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the account was last updated.

AccountBranding.description: AccountBranding holds the branding metadata for an account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the branding record.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the branding was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the branding was last updated.

AccountGroup.description: AccountGroup represents an account group used for organizing customer accounts.

id.description: The unique identifier for the account group.

name.description: The display name of the account group.

description.description: A description of the account group.

commission_policy.description: The commission policy of the account group.

freight_policy.description: The freight policy of the account group.

created_at.description: When this account group was created.

updated_at.description: When this account group was last updated.

AccountPortal.description: AccountPortal holds the portal metadata for an account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the portal record.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the portal was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the portal was last updated.

Actor.description: Actor is a reference to an actor (user, API key, or agent).

id.description: The unique identifier for the actor.

name.description: The display name of the actor.

handle.description: Human-readable handle (email for users, redacted value for API keys, slug for agents).

role.description: The role assigned to the actor.

Address.description: Address represents an address with its associated geolocation.

id.description: The unique identifier for the address.

name.description: The display name of the address.

phone.description: The phone number associated with this address.

email.description: The email address associated with this address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether this is a drop ship address.

geolocation.description: The geolocation details for this address.

created_at.description: When this address was created.

updated_at.description: When this address was last updated.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the street address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the street address.

AddressInput.description:
AddressInput represents an inline address to create with a parent resource.
Field names align with the Address resource shape.

name.description: The display name of the address.

phone.description: The phone number associated with this address.

email.description: The email address associated with this address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether this is a drop ship address.

street_line_1.description: The first line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: The second line of the street address.

id.description: The Google Places ID for the suggestion.

description.description: The full text description of the suggestion.

main_text.description: The main text of the suggestion (typically the street address).

secondary_text.description: The secondary text of the suggestion (typically city, state, country).

Attribute.description: Attribute represents a value option within a property.

id.description: The unique identifier for the attribute.

color_code.description: The color code of the attribute.

sort_order.description: The display order of the attribute.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the attribute was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the attribute was last updated.

AuditEvent.description:
AuditEvent represents a single immutable audit event record. Audit events
capture who mutated a resource, what changed, and when, providing a
comprehensive edit history for compliance and traceability.

id.description: The unique identifier for the audit event.

action.description: The type of mutation that occurred.

resource_type.description: The resource type of the audited entity.

resource_id.description: The unique identifier of the audited resource.

actor.description: The actor who performed the mutation.

changes.description: The field-level changes recorded for this event.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON metadata associated with the mutation (e.g. reason, source, tags).

request_id.description: The originating HTTP request ID, when available.

idempotency_key_id.description: The idempotency key ID associated with the originating request, when applicable.

source_ip.description: The originating client IP address, when available.

created_at.description: When the audit event record was created.

AuditFieldChange.description:
AuditFieldChange represents a single field-level before/after transition
recorded during an update mutation.

field.description: The name of the field that changed.

old_value.description: The previous value of the field as a JSON fragment, or null for creation events.

new_value.description: The new value of the field as a JSON fragment, or null for deletion events.

Carrier.description: Carrier represents a shipping carrier configured for the account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the carrier.

name.description: The display name of the carrier.

account_number.description: The carrier account number, if applicable.

customer_portal_visibility.description: Whether this carrier is visible in the customer portal.

deleted_at.description: When the carrier was soft-deleted, if applicable.

created_at.description: When the carrier was created.

updated_at.description: When the carrier was last updated.

Consumption.description: Consumption represents a material consumed by a production step.

id.description: The unique identifier for the consumption.

instructions.description: Optional instructions for how this material is consumed.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the consumption was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the consumption was last updated.

ConsumptionItem.description: ConsumptionItem is a lightweight item representation for consumption sub-resources.

id.description: The unique identifier for the item.

CreateAPIKeyRequest.description: The request to create an API key

role_id.description: The role ID for the API key.

name.description: The name for the API key.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration time for the API key.

CreateAccountGroupRequest.description: CreateAccountGroupRequest is the request to create a new account group.

name.description: The display name of the account group.

description.description: An optional description of the account group.

CreateAddressRequest.description: CreateAddressRequest is the request to create a new address.

name.description: The display name of the address.

phone.description: The phone number associated with this address.

email.description: The email address associated with this address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether this is a drop ship address.

street_line_1.description: The first line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: The second line of the street address.

CreateAttributeRequest.description: CreateAttributeRequest is the request to create a new attribute.

color_code.description: The color code of the attribute. Randomly assigned if not provided.

sort_order.description: The display order of the attribute. Defaults to last position if not provided.

CreateCustomerRequest.description: CreateCustomerRequest is the request to create a new customer.

name.description: The display name of the customer.

is_edi_enabled.description: Whether the customer is EDI enabled.

commission_policy.description: The commission policy for this customer.

freight_policy.description: The freight policy for this customer.

default_sales_rep_user_id.description: The default sales rep user ID.

bill_to_address.description: The bill-to address for this customer.

ship_to_address.description: The ship-to address for this customer.

CreateItemCategoryRequest.description: CreateItemCategoryRequest is the request to create a new item category.

name.description: The display name of the item category.

type.description: The type of item category (material_category or product_category).

unit_group_id.description: The ID of the unit group to associate with this item category.

CreateLocationRequest.description: CreateLocationRequest is the request to create a new location.

name.description: The display name of the location.

type_code.description: The code of the location type.

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent location. Null for top-level locations.

child_ids.description: IDs of existing locations to attach as children of this location.

CreatePaymentTermRequest.description: CreatePaymentTermRequest is the request to create a new payment term.

name.description: The display name of the payment term (e.g. "Net 30").

CreateProductLineRequest.description: CreateProductLineRequest is the request to create a new product line.

name.description: The display name of the product line.

unit_group_id.description: The ID of the unit group to associate with this product line.

commission_policy.description: The commission policy for this product line.

freight_policy.description: The freight policy for this product line.

CreatePropertyRequest.description: CreatePropertyRequest is the request to create a new property.

name.description: The name of the property.

CreateRoleRequest.description: CreateRoleRequest is the request to create a new role.

name.description: The display name of the role.

permissions.description: The permissions to attach to this role in "domain:action" format.

CreateSandboxRequest.description: The request to create a sandbox.

name.description: The display name for the sandbox.

mode.description: Controls whether the sandbox is blank or seeded with tutorial data.

CreateScanningStationRequest.description: CreateScanningStationRequest is the request to create a new scanning station.

name.description: The display name of the scanning station.

notes.description: Optional notes about the scanning station.

material_check_required.description: Whether material check is required at this station.

department_id.description: The ID of the department to associate with this scanning station.

CreateShippingTermRequest.description: CreateShippingTermRequest is the request to create a new shipping term.

name.description: The display name of the shipping term.

flat_rate.description: The flat rate for this shipping term.

minimum_order_value.description: The minimum order value for free shipping under this term.

free_shipping_service_level_ids.description: The service level IDs that qualify for free shipping.

CreateUnitGroupRequest.description: CreateUnitGroupRequest is the request to create a new unit group.

name.description: The display name of the unit group.

notes.description: Optional notes about the unit group.

associated_units.description: Optional associated units to create with the group.

CreateUnitGroupUnitParam.description: CreateUnitGroupUnitParam carries data for a single associated unit.

customer_portal_visibility.description: Whether this associated unit is visible in the customer portal.

CreateUnitGroupUnitRequest.description: CreateUnitGroupUnitRequest is the request to create an associated unit within a unit group.

customer_portal_visibility.description: Whether this associated unit is visible in the customer portal.

CreateUnitRequest.description: CreateUnitRequest is the request to create a new unit.

name.description: The display name of the unit (e.g. "Gram").

abbreviation.description: The short abbreviation for the unit (e.g. "g").

ratio_numerator.description: The conversion ratio numerator relative to the base unit, as a decimal string.

ratio_denominator.description: The conversion ratio denominator relative to the base unit, as a decimal string.

offset_numerator.description: The conversion offset numerator, as a decimal string.

offset_denominator.description: The conversion offset denominator, as a decimal string.

CreatedAPIKey.description: CreatedAPIKey represents a newly created API key with the full secret value.

api_key_secret.description: The full API key secret value (only shown once at creation).

Customer.description: Customer represents a customer account with full detail.

id.description: The unique identifier for the customer (account ID).

name.description: The display name of the customer.

is_edi_enabled.description: Whether EDI is enabled for this customer.

is_parent_account.description: Whether this customer is a parent account.

commission_policy.description: The commission status for this customer.

parent_account.description: The parent customer account, if this is a child account.

child_accounts.description: The child customer accounts, if this is a parent account.

created_at.description: When this customer was created.

updated_at.description: When this customer was last updated.

CustomerContactInfo.description: CustomerContactInfo groups the customer's contact information.

CustomerDefaults.description: CustomerDefaults groups the customer's default configuration.

CustomerFreightPreferences.description: CustomerFreightPreferences groups the customer's freight and carrier settings.

status.description: The freight status for this customer.

CustomerNotificationPreferences.description: CustomerNotificationPreferences groups the customer's notification settings.

accepts_invoice_emails.description: Whether the customer accepts invoice emails.

Department.description: Department represents a department within an account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the department.

name.description: The display name of the department.

location.description: The location associated with this department.

scanning_stations.description: The scanning stations belonging to this department.

machines.description: The machines belonging to this department.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the department was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the department was last updated.

EmailLog.description: EmailLog represents an email log entry.

id.description: The unique identifier for the email log.

ses_message_id.description: The SES message ID returned by AWS.

sent_by.description: The user who sent the email. Null if not associated with a user.

created_at.description: When this email log was created.

updated_at.description: When this email log was last updated.

Geolocation.description: Geolocation represents a geolocation sub-resource within an address.

id.description: The unique identifier for the geolocation.

street_line_1.description: The first line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: The second line of the street address.

ItemCategory.description: ItemCategory represents a full item category resource.

id.description: The unique identifier for the item category.

name.description: The display name of the item category.

properties.description: The properties associated with this item category.

unit_group.description: The unit group associated with this item category.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the item category was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the item category was last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier for the location.

name.description: The display name of the location.

type_code.description: The code of the location type.

parent.description: The parent location. Null if this is a top-level location. Expandable.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the location was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the location was last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier for the location type.

code.description: The unique code for this type.

name.description: The display name of the type.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the type was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the type was last updated.

Machine.description: Machine represents a machine within an account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the machine.

name.description: The display name of the machine.

serial_number.description: The serial number of the machine.

department.description: The department this machine belongs to.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the machine was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the machine was last updated.

MergeCustomersRequest.description: MergeCustomersRequest is the request to merge source customers into a target customer.

source_customer_ids.description: The IDs of the source customers to merge from.

Owner.description: Owner describes the provenance of a resource.

type.description: The owner type: "system" for platform defaults, "account" for account-owned resources.

account.description: The account that owns this resource. Present when type is "account".

OwnerAccount.description: OwnerAccount is a minimal account reference within an Owner.

id.description: The unique identifier for the account.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to fetch the next page of results, null if no more pages.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to fetch the previous page of results, null if on the first page.

has_next_page.description: Whether there are more results after this page.

has_prev_page.description: Whether there are results before this page.

PaymentTerm.description: PaymentTerm represents an account-owned or default payment term.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment term.

name.description: The display name of the payment term.

status.description: The status of the payment term.

created_at.description: When this payment term was created.

updated_at.description: When this payment term was last updated.

Priority.description: Priority represents a priority level used by sales orders and picks.

id.description: The unique identifier for the priority.

name.description: The display name of the priority.

created_at.description: When this priority was created.

updated_at.description: When this priority was last updated.

ProductLine.description: ProductLine represents a full product line resource.

id.description: The unique identifier for the product line.

name.description: The display name of the product line.

description.description: Optional description of the product line.

notes.description: Optional notes about the product line.

commission_policy.description: The commission policy for this product line.

freight_policy.description: The freight policy for this product line.

unit_group.description: The unit group associated with this product line.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the product line was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the product line was last updated.

ProductionOutput.description: ProductionOutput represents the production output of a production step.

id.description: The unique identifier for the production.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the production was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the production was last updated.

ProductionStep.description: ProductionStep represents a production step with all nested data.

id.description: The unique identifier for the production step.

name.description: The display name of the production step.

notes.description: Optional notes about the production step.

leveling_factor.description: The leveling factor as a decimal string.

allowances.description: The allowances as a decimal string.

labor_rate.description: The labor rate for this step.

labor_time.description: The labor time for this step.

overhead_rate.description: The overhead rate for this step.

production.description: The production output for this step.

machines.description: The machines assigned to this step.

scanning_station.description: The scanning station for this step.

in_steps.description: The input steps that feed into this step.

out_steps.description: The output steps that this step feeds into.

department.description: The department this step belongs to.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the production step was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the production step was last updated.

ProductionStepDepartment.description: ProductionStepDepartment is a department reference on a production step.

id.description: The unique identifier for the department.

ProductionStepMachine.description: ProductionStepMachine is a machine reference on a production step.

id.description: The unique identifier for the machine.

name.description: The display name of the machine.

ProductionStepRef.description: ProductionStepRef is a minimal production step reference.

id.description: The unique identifier for the production step.

name.description: The display name of the production step.

ProductionStepScanStation.description: ProductionStepScanStation is a scanning station reference on a production step.

id.description: The unique identifier for the scanning station.

name.description: The display name of the scanning station.

Property.description: Property represents a property that groups attributes.

id.description: The unique identifier for the property.

name.description: The name of the property.

attributes.description: The attributes belonging to this property.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the property was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the property was last updated.

Quantity.description: Quantity represents a value with an associated unit.

id.description: The unique identifier for the quantity.

value.description: The decimal value of the quantity.

display_value.description: A human-readable formatted value including the unit (e.g. "$1,234.56" or "100 kg").

unit.description: The unit associated with this quantity.

QuantityInputRequest.description: QuantityInputRequest represents a quantity value and unit pair.

unit_id.description: The unit ID for the value.

QuotaInfo.description:
QuotaInfo provides machine-readable details about a plan-imposed resource limit.
Included in limit_exceeded errors so clients can display upgrade prompts, usage bars,
or implement programmatic retry/backoff logic.

limit.description: Limit is the maximum number of resources allowed by the current plan.

used.description: Used is the number of resources currently consumed.

reset_at.description: ResetAt is the time when the quota resets, if applicable. Nil for static (non-metered) limits.

Rate.description: Rate represents a ratio between two quantities with different units.

id.description: The unique identifier for the rate.

value.description: The rate value as a decimal string.

numerator_unit.description: The numerator unit for this rate.

denominator_unit.description: The denominator unit for this rate.

display_value.description: A human-readable formatted value including the unit (e.g. "$25.50 / kg" or "100 kg / hr").

created_at.description: When this rate was created.

updated_at.description: When this rate was last updated.

RequestLog.description: RequestLog represents a single API request log entry.

id.description: The unique identifier for the request log.

identity_type.description: The identity type of the caller.

error_code.description: The API error code, if any.

created_at.description: When the log entry was created.

account.description: The account targeted by the request.

ResponseError.description:
ResponseError is the JSON-serializable error body returned to API clients. It contains
only public information. This struct is used by the OpenAPI schema generator to produce
documentation.

code.description: A machine-readable code for the error.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.

param.description: The parameter that caused the error, if applicable.

doc_url.description: A URL to documentation about the error.

is_transient.description: Whether this error is transient and the request can be retried.

quota.description: Quota provides plan limit details when the error is limit_exceeded. Nil otherwise.

request_log_url.description:
RequestLogURL is a link to the dashboard page for this request's log entry.
Nil when no request log is available.

id.description: The unique identifier for the role.

name.description: The display name of the role.

permissions.description: The permissions for this role in "{domain}:{action}" format.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the role was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the role was last updated.

RotateAPIKeyRequest.description: The request to rotate an API key, optionally overriding the expiration

expires_at.description: Optional expiration time override for the new API key.

Sandbox.description: Sandbox represents an isolated testing environment for an account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the sandbox.

name.description: The display name of the sandbox.

owner_account.description: The owner account of this sandbox.

created_at.description: When this sandbox was created.

updated_at.description: When this sandbox was last updated.

ScanningStation.description: ScanningStation represents a scanning station with all its details.

id.description: The unique identifier for the scanning station.

name.description: The display name of the scanning station.

notes.description: Optional notes about the scanning station.

label_size_code.description: The label size code for the scanning station.

label_type_code.description: The label type code for the scanning station.

material_check_required.description: Whether material check is required at this station.

department.description: The department this scanning station belongs to.

production_steps.description: The production steps connected to this scanning station.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the scanning station was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the scanning station was last updated.

ServiceLevel.description: ServiceLevel represents a shipping service level for a carrier.

id.description: The unique identifier for the service level.

name.description: The display name of the service level.

service_level_token.description: The service level token identifying this shipping service level.

customer_portal_visibility.description: Whether this service level is visible in the customer portal.

is_default.description: Whether this is the default service level for the carrier.

created_at.description: When the service level was created.

updated_at.description: When the service level was last updated.

ShippingTerm.description: ShippingTerm represents a shipping term configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier for the shipping term.

name.description: The display name of the shipping term.

flat_rate.description: The flat rate quantity for this shipping term, if any.

minimum_order_value.description: The minimum order value quantity for this shipping term, if any.

free_shipping_service_levels.description: The service levels that qualify for free shipping under this term.

created_at.description: When this shipping term was created.

updated_at.description: When this shipping term was last updated.

Unit.description: Unit represents a unit of measurement used for conversions and product quantities.

id.description: The unique identifier for the unit.

name.description: The display name of the unit (e.g. "Gram", "Kilogram").

abbreviation.description: The short abbreviation for the unit (e.g. "g", "kg").

ratio_numerator.description: The conversion ratio numerator relative to the base unit in the same dimension.

ratio_denominator.description: The conversion ratio denominator relative to the base unit in the same dimension.

offset_numerator.description: The conversion offset numerator, used for temperature-like conversions. Zero for most unit types.

is_base_unit.description: Whether this unit is the base unit for its dimension. Conversion ratios are relative to this unit.

created_at.description: When this unit was created.

updated_at.description: When this unit was last updated.

UnitGroup.description: UnitGroup represents a unit group resource with base unit and associated units.

id.description: The unique identifier for the unit group.

name.description: The display name of the unit group.

base_unit.description: The base unit for this group.

associated_units.description: The associated units in this group.

created_at.description: When this unit group was created.

updated_at.description: When this unit group was last updated.

UnitGroupUnit.description: UnitGroupUnit represents an associated unit within a unit group.

id.description: The unique identifier for the unit group unit.

discount_percentage.description: The discount percentage for this associated unit.

discount_fixed.description: The fixed discount amount for this associated unit.

customer_portal_visibility.description: Whether this associated unit is visible in the customer portal.

created_at.description: When this associated unit was created.

updated_at.description: When this associated unit was last updated.

UpdateAccountGroupRequest.description: UpdateAccountGroupRequest is the request to partially update an account group.

name.description: The display name of the account group.

description.description: An optional description of the account group.

UpdateAddressRequest.description: UpdateAddressRequest is the request to partially update an address.

name.description: The display name of the address.

phone.description: The phone number associated with this address.

email.description: The email address associated with this address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether this is a drop ship address.

street_line_1.description: The first line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: The second line of the street address.

UpdateAttributeRequest.description: UpdateAttributeRequest is the request to update an attribute.

value.description: The new value of the attribute.

color_code.description: The new color code of the attribute.

sort_order.description: The new display order of the attribute.

UpdateCustomerRequest.description: UpdateCustomerRequest is the request to partially update a customer.

name.description: The customer name.

email.description: The customer email address. Send null to clear.

phone.description: The customer phone number. Send null to clear.

url.description: The customer website URL. Send null to clear.

is_edi_enabled.description: Whether the customer is EDI enabled.

commission_policy.description: The commission policy for this customer.

freight_policy.description: The freight policy for this customer.

default_sales_rep_user_id.description: The default sales rep user ID.

customer_price_group_ids.description: The customer price group IDs. When provided, replaces all existing price groups.

UpdateItemCategoryRequest.description: UpdateItemCategoryRequest is the request to partially update an item category.

name.description: The display name of the item category.

notes.description: Optional notes about the item category.

UpdateLocationRequest.description: UpdateLocationRequest is the request to partially update a location.

name.description: The display name of the location.

type_code.description: The code of the location type.

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent location. Send null to clear.

clear_parent.description: Set to true to remove the parent (make top-level).

child_ids.description: The IDs of child locations. When provided, replaces all current children.

UpdatePaymentTermRequest.description: UpdatePaymentTermRequest is the request to partially update a payment term.

name.description: The display name of the payment term.

UpdateProductLineRequest.description: UpdateProductLineRequest is the request to partially update a product line.

name.description: The display name of the product line.

commission_policy.description: The commission policy for this product line.

freight_policy.description: The freight policy for this product line.

unit_group_id.description: The ID of the unit group to associate with this product line.

UpdatePropertyRequest.description: UpdatePropertyRequest is the request to update a property.

name.description: The new name of the property.

UpdateRoleRequest.description: UpdateRoleRequest is the request to update a role.

name.description: The new display name for the role.

permissions.description: The full set of permissions to replace existing ones with in "domain:action" format. If omitted, permissions are not changed.

UpdateScanningStationRequest.description: UpdateScanningStationRequest is the request to partially update a scanning station.

name.description: The display name of the scanning station.

notes.description: Optional notes about the scanning station.

label_size_code.description: The label size code for the scanning station.

label_type_code.description: The label type code for the scanning station.

material_check_required.description: Whether material check is required at this station.

UpdateShippingTermRequest.description:
UpdateShippingTermRequest is the request to partially update a shipping term.
All fields are optional. Absent fields are left unchanged. Explicitly null
values for flat_rate, minimum_order_value, and free_shipping_service_level_ids
clear the existing value.

name.description: The display name of the shipping term.

flat_rate.description: The flat rate for this shipping term. Send null to clear.

minimum_order_value.description: The minimum order value for free shipping under this term. Send null to clear.

free_shipping_service_level_ids.description: The service level IDs that qualify for free shipping. Send null to clear.

UpdateUnitGroupRequest.description: UpdateUnitGroupRequest is the request to partially update a unit group.

name.description: The display name of the unit group.

notes.description: Optional notes about the unit group. Set to null to clear.

associated_units.description: If provided, upserts associated units. Existing associated units not in the list are preserved.

UpdateUnitGroupUnitRequest.description: UpdateUnitGroupUnitRequest is the request to update an associated unit.

customer_portal_visibility.description: Whether this associated unit is visible in the customer portal.

UpdateUnitRequest.description: UpdateUnitRequest is the request to partially update a unit.

name.description: The display name of the unit.

abbreviation.description: The short abbreviation for the unit.

ratio_numerator.description: The conversion ratio numerator, as a decimal string.

ratio_denominator.description: The conversion ratio denominator, as a decimal string.

offset_numerator.description: The conversion offset numerator, as a decimal string.

offset_denominator.description: The conversion offset denominator, as a decimal string.

User.description: A user in the Augno system.

id.description: The unique identifier for this user.

name.description: The user's display name.

email_verified_at.description: When the user's email was verified, null if unverified.

image_url.description: URL to the user's profile image.

created_at.description: When this user was created.

updated_at.description: When this user was last updated.

ValidateAddressRequest.description: ValidateAddressRequest is the request to validate an address.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the street address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the street address.

ValidatedAddress.description: ValidatedAddress represents the result of address validation.

is_valid.description: Whether the address is considered valid.

formatted_address.description: The formatted address as returned by the validation service.

validation_messages.description: Validation messages describing any issues found.
